title: Lunen.ai · Say yes to AI without giving up control
excerpt: AI is already running inside your organization, just not under your control. Lunen lets anyone build the agents they need while you approve every action and keep everything on the record. Building AI and governing it, finally the same path. Now accepting design partners.
content_html:
Anyone builds the agent they need. You approve every action it takes. Everything is on the record.

Agents for your existing tools

One governed control plane

95%

of enterprise AI pilots die before anyone actually uses them.

Not because the models aren't good enough. Because the tools never make it past a security review. Or they clear it, and nobody wants to use them. So AI keeps running in the shadows, on personal accounts, outside your visibility.

Gartner says the root cause is treating agent governance as all-or-nothing: lock everything down and delivery stalls; leave it open and you get an incident.

Source: Gartner · enterprise AI adoption research

What a Wednesday with Lunen looks like.

Three teams. Three agents running overnight. Three different ways the morning starts.

By 8:00 AM

Marketing opens Slack to a ranked list of yesterday's new leads, scored by fit, with a one-line note on why each one is worth a call.

Powered by

lead-scoring

Daily · runs at 7:30 AM

Building AI and governing it,
finally the same path.

Everywhere else, these are two systems and two teams. The builders pick a tool IT hasn't approved. IT buys a governance layer nobody wants to build in. The gap between them is where enterprise AI goes to die.

In Lunen there is one path. The same flow that lets someone in accounting describe an agent in plain language is the flow that scopes its data, sets its permissions, and logs its actions. Easy is not the opposite of governed. In Lunen they are the same motion.

Three things happen at once.

Describe the agent. Watch the plan write itself.

No drag-and-drop builder. No YAML to learn. A subject-matter expert types what they want in plain language; Lunen drafts a structured execution plan with named tools, scoped data, and a clear schedule. Review it, save it, run it.

Allow the reads.
Approve the writes.

Designed to be defended in a security review.

Every MCP tool becomes a policy decision. Allow it to run unattended, or require a human approval before each call. The same toggles cover every agent and every ad-hoc run, so nothing reaches production data without the rule you set.

Every action, on the record.

User actions and agent actions roll up in the same audit log. Open any event to see who acted, what was approved, what model ran, and which data it touched. Everything a security review needs, exported on demand.

Built by people who have shipped into your environment.

Lunen comes out of REDspace, where we have spent 25+ years building and running enterprise platforms for some of the largest media and technology companies in the world. We built Lunen because we kept watching the same thing happen: AI projects that worked in a demo and died in a security review.

We know what your environment actually looks like, because we have been deploying into it for two decades.

Heritage
25+ years of enterprise platform engineering.

Scale
Platforms run by some of the world's largest media and technology companies.

Focus
AI adoption that survives the security review.

Be one of the first teams to govern AI.

We're working directly with a small group of design partners to shape Lunen. Sign up and we'll schedule a call to understand your AI adoption challenges. No pitch deck, just a conversation.

content_html_zh:
任何人都可以构建他们需要的代理。 您批准它采取的每一个行动。 一切都记录在案。

您现有工具的代理

一个受控控制平面

95%

的企业人工智能飞行员在有人真正使用它们之前就去世了。

并不是因为模型不够好。 因为这些工具永远不会通过安全审查。 或者他们清除了它，没有人愿意使用它们。 因此，人工智能一直在暗处、在个人账户上、在你的视线之外运行。

Gartner 表示，根本原因是将代理治理视为“全有或全无”：锁定一切并导致交付停滞；如果让它保持打开状态，就会发生事故。

来源：Gartner·企业人工智能采用研究

与鲁南一起度过的星期三是多么美好啊。

三队。 三个特工连夜运行。 早晨以三种不同的方式开始。

By 8:00 AM

营销部门向 Slack 开放了一份昨天新潜在客户的排名列表，按适合程度进行评分，并附有一行注释，说明为什么每个潜在客户都值得一通。

供电

线索评分

每日 · 上午 7:30 运行

构建人工智能并对其进行治理，最终走的是同一条路。

在其他地方，都是两个系统和两个团队。 构建者选择了 IT 尚未批准的工具。 IT 部门购买了一个无人愿意构建的治理层。 它们之间的差距是企业人工智能走向消亡的地方。

在鲁嫩只有一条路。 让会计人员用简单语言描述代理的流程与确定其数据范围、设置其权限并记录其操作的流程相同。 轻松并不是治理的对立面。 在鲁南，它们是相同的运动。

三件事同时发生。

描述一下代理。 观察计划本身的书写。

没有拖放构建器。 无需学习 YAML。 主题专家用简单的语言输入他们想要的内容； Lunen 使用命名工具、范围数据和明确的时间表起草了结构化执行计划。 检查它、保存它、运行它。

允许读取。批准写入。

旨在在安全审查中进行辩护。

每个 MCP 工具都成为一项政策决定。 允许它在无人值守的情况下运行，或者在每次调用之前都需要人工批准。 相同的切换涵盖每个代理和每个临时运行，因此如果没有您设置的规则，则不会到达生产数据。

每一个动作，都记录在案。

用户操作和代理操作汇总在同一审核日志中。 打开任何事件即可查看谁采取了行动、批准了什么、运行什么模型以及它涉及哪些数据。 安全审查所需的一切均按需导出。

由已经进入您的环境的人员构建。

Lunen 来自 REDspace，我们在 REDspace 花了 25 年以上的时间为世界上一些最大的媒体和技术公司构建和运营企业平台。 我们创建 Lunen 是因为我们一直在观察同样的事情发生：在演示中运行的人工智能项目在安全审查中失败。

我们知道您的环境实际上是什么样子，因为我们已经在其中部署了二十年。

传承25年以上企业平台工程经验。

ScalePlatforms 由一些全球最大的媒体和技术公司运营。

FocusAI 的采用通过了安全审查。

成为最早管理人工智能的团队之一。

我们正在与一小群设计合作伙伴直接合作来塑造 Lunen。 注册后，我们将安排一次通话，以了解您在采用人工智能方面面临的挑战。 没有融资演讲稿，只有对话。
